title: gymnanthemum andersonii
intro: Gymnanthemum andersonii, also known as Indian Sage or Wild Sage, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Gymnanthemum andersonii has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of consuming this plant include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as improved digestion and immunity. Gymnanthemum andersonii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
